name: Roofcats Band - Suika Style
short_description: What do cats do on the roof? They play jazz, rock, metal and more! In this Suika-like game, you must match the cats to make new musicians appear, all while avoiding overflow and dealing with a crazy dog that shows up to mess things up. Will you be able to hear a killer guitar solo on the last cat?
detailed_description:
Ever wondered what mischief cats get up to on the roof? Well, they're not just lazing around – they're hosting the ultimate rooftop jam session! Picture this: jazz, rock, samba and a whole lot more.



  • Innovative features like adaptive music, different game modes and a dog that mess the things up.
  • Classic mode, Dog Challenge mode, High Score or Low Score modes.
  • Dynamic, interactive songs that evolve with the gameplay, composed exclusively for the game.
  • Four different levels with unique and original music.
  • Hand-drawn artwork and animations for a visually captivating experience.
  • Global leaderboards.
  • Challenging achievements.



Your mission is to skillfully match the feline musicians, summoning new talents while dodging overflow and contending with an occasional canine disruptor. Oh, and the climax? Brace yourself for a mind-blowing guitar solo on the final cat. Are you up for the challenge? The purr-fect musical adventure awaits!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Italian, Traditional Chinese
